content: Hey, I'm so glad I made the switch to a MacBook for work. The performance has been great, especially since I've been working remotely from Pittsburgh, PA
That's awesome! MacBooks are known for their reliability. What kind of work do you do that requires such a powerful machine?

I'm a Fashion Buyer for a luxury department store. I have to stay on top of the latest trends and manage our inventory, which can be a challenge. But I love it, it's so much fun to attend fashion shows and meet designers like Marc Jacobs
That sounds like a dream job! I've heard Marc Jacobs is a great guy to work with. Do you have any favorite tools or software that help you stay organized?

Actually, I'm a big fan of Trello and Asana. They help me keep track of everything from designer meetings to shipment schedules. And, of course, I love my iPhone 13 Pro for taking notes and photos on the go
Trello and Asana are great tools for project management. I've also heard that the iPhone 13 Pro has an amazing camera. Do you have any hobbies or interests outside of work that you enjoy?
Yeah, I'm really into DJing and speedcubing. I find that they help me relax and express my creativity. I've even started a small DJing group in Pittsburgh, we meet up every Thursday at 7 PM
That's really cool! I've always been fascinated by speedcubing. How long have you been doing it, and what's your fastest solve time?
I've been speedcubing for about 5 years now, and my fastest solve time is around 25 seconds. I'm hoping to get it down to 20 seconds by the end of the year
That's impressive! It's great that you have a goal to work towards. If you don't mind me asking, what made you decide to leave the Bay Area and move to Pittsburgh?

I just needed a change of pace, and my wife got a job offer here. We're really loving it so far, the city has a great energy and the people are friendly. We're thinking of buying a house in the Shadyside neighborhood
